name: Game.Resources

unions.name: Resources
unions.comment: The main type of this library

aliases.name: LoadTextureConfig
aliases.type: { success : Msg -> msg, failed : String -> msg }

values.name: getTexture
values.comment: Returns a maybe as the texture might not be loaded yet.

values.name: loadTextures
values.comment:
Loads a list of textures from the given urls.
PNGs and JPEGs are known to work.
For WebGL make sure that your textures have a dimension with a power of two, e.g. 2^n x 2^m

values.name: loadTexturesWithConfig
values.comment:
Same as loadTextures, but gives you more controll
by being able to react to a texture loading error
and by specifying a texture filter.

    loadTexturesWithConfig
        { success = Resources
        , failed = LoadingTextureFailed
        }
        [ (linear, "images/blob.png"), (nearest, "images/box.jpeg") ]
values.type: LoadTextureConfig msg -> List ( TextureFilter, String ) -> Cmd msg
